title: Evidence of Feedback Effects in Low-luminosity Active Galactic Nuclei Revealed by JWST Spectroscopy
comment: 24 pages (7 pages in the Appendix); 11 figures (4 figures in the Appendix); ApJL in press; This letter is part of a series from the Galaxy Activity, Torus, and Outflow Survey (GATOS; https://gatos.myportfolio.com) collaboration
summary: This letter presents an analysis of the infrared ($\sim 3-28\,μm$) spectra extracted from the nuclear ($r < 150$ pc) regions of four low-luminosity active galactic nuclei (AGN), observed by JWST NIRSpec/IFU and MIRI/MRS as an extension of the Galaxy Activity, Torus, and Outflow Survey (GATOS). We find that, compared to higher-luminosity AGN, these low-luminosity AGN exhibit distinct properties in their emission of ionized gas, polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbons (PAHs), and molecular hydrogen (H$_2$). Specifically, the low-luminosity AGN exhibit relatively weak high-ionization potential lines (e.g., [Ne V] and [O IV]), and the line ratios suggest that fast radiative shocks (with $v_{\rm s}$ of $\sim \rm 100s\,km\,s^{-1}$) are the primary excitation source of ionized gas therein. Under the low-excitation conditions of their nuclear regions, these low-luminosity AGN generally exhibit a higher fraction of PAHs with large size ($N_{\rm C} \gtrsim 200$), reflecting the preferential destruction of smaller PAH molecules by AGN feedback. Furthermore, the H$_2$ transitions in these low-luminosity AGN are not fully thermalized, with slow, plausibly jet-driven molecular shocks (with $v_{\rm s} \leq \rm 10\,km\,s^{-1}$) likely being the extra excitation source. Taken together with results from the literature, these findings indicate that feedback operates in both low- and high-luminosity AGN, albeit its impact varies with AGN luminosity. In particular, systematic variations in PAH band ratios are found across AGN, demonstrating the differing influence of feedback in AGN of varying luminosities and highlighting the potential of PAH band ratios as diagnostics for distinguishing kinetic- and radiative-mode AGN feedback.

AI.tldr: JWST观测低光度AGN发现其红外光谱特征与高光度AGN不同：电离气体激发主要来自快速辐射激波，PAH分子中大尺寸比例更高，H2跃迁未完全热化，表明AGN反馈效应随光度变化
AI.motivation: 研究低光度活动星系核（AGN）的红外光谱特征，了解AGN反馈机制在不同光度条件下的表现差异，特别是通过JWST观测数据扩展GATOS巡天研究
AI.method: 使用JWST的NIRSpec/IFU和MIRI/MRS仪器观测四个低光度AGN的核区（r < 150 pc），分析3-28μm红外光谱中的电离气体发射线、多环芳烃（PAH）和分子氢（H2）特征
AI.result: 低光度AGN表现出相对较弱的高电离势谱线（如[Ne V]和[O IV]），线比表明快速辐射激波（速度约100s km/s）是电离气体的主要激发源；PAH中大尺寸分子（Nc ≳ 200）比例更高；H2跃迁未完全热化，可能存在慢速激波（vs ≤ 10 km/s）作为额外激发源
AI.conclusion: AGN反馈在低光度和高光度AGN中都存在，但其影响程度随AGN光度变化；PAH带比在AGN中存在系统性变化，可作为区分动能模式和辐射模式AGN反馈的诊断工具

title: Relatively Fast and Reasonably Furious: Evidence for Increased Burstiness in Smaller Halos at Cosmic Dawn
summary: We introduce an effective framework to model star-formation burstiness and use it to jointly fit galaxy UV luminosity functions (UVLFs), clustering, and H$α$/UV ratios, providing the first robust empirical evidence that early galaxies hosted in lower-mass halos are burstier. Using $z\sim 4-6$ observations, we find that galaxies show approximately $0.6$ dex of SFR variability if hosted in halos of $M_h = 10^{11}\, M_\odot$ (typical of $M_{\rm UV}\approx -19$ galaxies at $z = 6$). This translates into a scatter of $σ_{M_{\rm UV}}\approx 0.75$ in the UVLF, in line with past findings. Strikingly, we find that burstiness grows for galaxies hosted in smaller halos, reaching $\gtrsim 1$ dex for $M_h \leq 10^{9}\, M_\odot$ (corresponding to $σ_{M_{\rm UV}} \approx 1.5$ for faint $M_{\rm UV} \gtrsim -15$ galaxies). Extrapolating to higher redshifts, when small halos were more prevalent, the inferred mass-dependent burstiness can reproduce observed UVLFs up to $z\sim 17$ within 1$σ$, potentially alleviating the tension between pre- and post-JWST galaxy-formation models. Current observations allow us to constrain burst timescales to approximately $20$ Myr, consistent with expectations from supernova feedback, and suggest broad distributions of ionizing efficiencies at fixed $M_{\rm UV}$. Our results demonstrate that mass-dependent burstiness, as predicted by hydrodynamical simulations, is critical for understanding the mass assembly of early galaxies.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出一个有效框架来模拟恒星形成的爆发性，通过联合拟合星系UV光度函数、聚类和Hα/UV比率，首次为早期低质量暗晕中的星系更具爆发性提供了经验证据。
AI.motivation: 理解早期星系的恒星形成爆发性对于解释星系形成模型中的张力（特别是JWST前后观测数据的不一致）至关重要。需要建立一个能够同时拟合多种观测数据的框架来约束爆发性的物理特性。
AI.method: 开发了一个有效框架来模拟恒星形成的爆发性，并联合拟合z∼4-6的星系UV光度函数、聚类和Hα/UV比率。通过观测数据约束爆发性的幅度和时间尺度，并将结果外推到更高红移。
AI.result: 发现星系恒星形成率存在约0.6 dex的变异性（对于M_h=10^11 M_⊙的暗晕），且爆发性随暗晕质量减小而增强，在M_h≤10^9 M_⊙时达到≳1 dex。爆发时间尺度约20 Myr，与超新星反馈预期一致。质量依赖的爆发性可以解释高达z∼17的UV光度函数。
AI.conclusion: 质量依赖的恒星形成爆发性（如流体动力学模拟所预测）对于理解早期星系的质量组装至关重要，可能缓解JWST前后星系形成模型之间的张力，并表明在固定UV光度下存在广泛的电离效率分布。

title: A precessing jet from an active galactic nucleus drives gas outflow from a disk galaxy
summary: To reproduce observed galaxy properties, cosmological simulations require that massive galaxies experience feedback from active galactic nuclei, which regulates star formation within those galaxies. However, the energetics and timescales of these feedback processes are poorly constrained. We combine optical, infrared, sub-millimeter and radio observations of the active galaxy VV 340a, hosting a low-power jet launched from a supermassive black hole at its center. We find that the jet undergoes precession, with a period of (8.2 $\pm~$5.5) $\times~$10$^5$ years, and drives an outflow of gas at a rate of 19.4 $\pm~$7.9 solar masses per year. The jet shocks the gas, producing highly ionized plasma extending several kiloparsecs from the nucleus. The outflow ejects sufficient gas from the galaxy to influence its star formation rate.

AI.tldr: 通过多波段观测发现活动星系VV 340a中的低功率喷流存在进动，驱动气体外流并影响星系恒星形成
AI.motivation: 为了解释观测到的星系性质，宇宙学模拟需要超大质量黑洞的反馈机制来调节恒星形成，但这些反馈过程的能量和时间尺度缺乏约束
AI.method: 结合光学、红外、亚毫米和射电波段对活动星系VV 340a进行多波段观测，分析其中心超大质量黑洞产生的低功率喷流
AI.result: 发现喷流存在进动现象，周期为(8.2±5.5)×10^5年；喷流驱动气体外流，速率为19.4±7.9太阳质量/年；喷流冲击气体产生高度电离等离子体，延伸数千秒差距；外流排出足够气体影响星系恒星形成率
AI.conclusion: 低功率活动星系核喷流通过驱动气体外流，能够显著影响宿主星系的恒星形成，为理解星系演化中的反馈机制提供了重要观测约束

title: One-Loop Tensor Power Spectrum from a Non-Minimally Coupled Spectator Field during Inflation
summary: We compute the full one-loop corrections to the primordial tensor power spectrum in an inflationary scenario with a non-minimally coupled spectator field, using the in-in formalism. We derive semi-analytic results for the scalar-sourced one-loop tensor spectrum and the effective tensor-to-scalar ratio, $r_{\mathrm{eff}}$ . We consider two representative coupling functions: a localized Gaussian dip (Model G), which leads to moderate loop corrections, and a rapidly oscillatory coupling (Model O), which can yield much larger loop contributions. For Model G, we find a $\mathcal{O}(1)$ correction to $r_{\mathrm{eff}}$ while Model O can significantly enhance $r_{\mathrm{eff}}$ by several orders of magnitude (relative to the tree-level value). We further calculate the energy density of primordial gravitational waves. Assuming that primordial black holes with mass $10^{-12}M_{\odot}$ generated in this scenario, constitute all of the dark matter, we find that the results are several orders of magnitude lower than the sensitivities of Taiji/TianQin/LISA.

AI.tldr: 计算了含非最小耦合旁观场暴胀模型中一阶张量功率谱的全一阶修正，得到标量源一阶张量谱和有效张标比，发现不同耦合函数导致修正幅度差异显著
AI.motivation: 研究非最小耦合旁观场对暴胀期间原初张量扰动的量子修正效应，探索不同耦合函数对原初引力波功率谱的影响
AI.method: 使用in-in形式体系计算一阶修正，推导标量源一阶张量谱的半解析结果，考虑两种代表性耦合函数：局部高斯凹陷（模型G）和快速振荡耦合（模型O）
AI.result: 模型G对有效张标比产生O(1)量级修正，模型O可使有效张标比相对树级值增强数个量级；计算的原初引力波能量密度比Taiji/TianQin/LISA探测灵敏度低数个量级
AI.conclusion: 非最小耦合旁观场对原初张量功率谱的一阶修正效应显著依赖于耦合函数形式，快速振荡耦合可大幅增强张标比，但产生的原初引力波信号仍低于当前计划探测器的灵敏度

title: Investigating quenching in Recently Quenched Elliptical galaxies with HI studies
summary: Recently Quenched Elliptical galaxies (RQEs) represent a critical phase in the transition from star-forming to quiescent galaxies. However, the mechanisms driving their quenching remain elusive. We conduct a multi-wavelength analysis of 155 RQEs, along with their precursors (preRQEs) and descendants (postRQEs), focusing on their neutral hydrogen (HI) content and star formation properties. Contrary to conventional quenching models emphasizing gas depletion, RQEs retain substantial HI reservoirs ($f_{\text{gas}} \geq 17\%$), suggesting that quenching is not primarily driven by gas exhaustion. We identify a critical halo mass threshold at $\log M_{\text{halo}} = 12.1 M_{\odot}$, delineating different evolutionary pathways for RQEs. This threshold aligns with the transition from cold-mode to hot-mode gas accretion in theoretical models. RQEs in lower-mass halos ($\log M_{\text{halo}} < 12.1 M_{\odot}$) likely experience rapid quenching, possibly initiated by major mergers, followed by brief AGN activity and sustained LINER emission. We propose two evolutionary pathways: (a) rapid quenching via major mergers followed by AGN/LINER activity and passive evolution, and (b) rapid quenching followed by rejuvenation through minor mergers before evolving into more massive, long-term quenched ellipticals. These results challenge the conventional understanding of galaxy quenching, especially in low-density environments where RQEs typically reside. Our findings suggest that while RQEs may follow a rapid quenching pathway, their evolution is influenced by interactions between gas accretion modes, feedback mechanisms, and environmental factors. Future observations with advanced radio interferometers like SKA will be crucial for elucidating the quenching mechanisms in RQEs and their role in galaxy evolution.

AI.tldr: RQEs保留大量中性氢气体，表明淬灭并非主要由气体耗尽驱动。研究发现12.1倍太阳质量的临界晕质量阈值，区分了RQEs的不同演化路径，挑战了传统星系淬灭模型。
AI.motivation: 研究RQEs的淬灭机制对于理解星系从恒星形成到静止的转变至关重要，但现有模型无法解释其淬灭过程。传统淬灭模型强调气体耗尽，但RQEs的观测特征与此不符。
AI.method: 对155个RQEs及其前体(preRQEs)和后体(postRQEs)进行多波段分析，重点关注中性氢(HI)含量和恒星形成特性，识别临界晕质量阈值并分析不同质量区间的演化路径。
AI.result: RQEs保留大量HI气体(气体分数≥17%)，表明淬灭不是由气体耗尽驱动。发现log M_halo=12.1 M⊙的临界晕质量阈值，区分了不同演化路径：低质量晕(<12.1)经历快速淬灭，可能由主要合并引发；提出两种演化路径：快速淬灭后AGN/LINER活动，或淬灭后通过次要合并复苏。
AI.conclusion: RQEs的淬灭机制挑战了传统理解，特别是在低密度环境中。演化受气体吸积模式、反馈机制和环境因素相互作用影响。未来SKA等先进射电干涉仪观测对阐明RQEs淬灭机制至关重要。

title: On the Jeans criterion for hydrostatic and infalling gas
summary: We study the local gravitational instability of non-rotating astrophysical fluids allowing for the presence of an external gravitational potential in addition to the fluid self-gravity. We present a self-consistent linear-perturbation analysis taking into account pressure and density gradients in the background medium. We explore two different steady-state configurations for the unperturbed gas: hydrostatic equilibrium and infall into a gravitational potential well. We show that in both cases the instability criterion is the classical Jeans criterion, which, contrary to previous claims, is not modified by the presence of the external gravitational field. While in the case of hydrostatic equilibrium linear local perturbations are always gravitationally stable, the conditions for gravitational instability can be met in the case of infalling gas, also in the presence of additional non-gravitational forces such as that due to a wind. We conclude that the Jeans criterion can have a role in regulating the formation of clumps and star clusters in streams or shells of gas infalling into galactic gravitational potential wells, as well as, on smaller scales, the fragmentation of gas in collapsing molecular clouds.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了非旋转天体物理流体在外部引力势和流体自引力共同作用下的局部引力不稳定性，证明经典金斯判据不受外部引力场影响，在流体下落情况下仍适用。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是澄清外部引力势对流体引力不稳定性的影响，特别是针对先前研究中认为外部引力场会修改金斯判据的说法，为理解星系引力势阱中气体流或壳层中团块和星团形成提供理论基础。
AI.method: 采用自洽的线性扰动分析方法，考虑背景介质中的压力和密度梯度，研究两种稳态配置：流体静力平衡状态和落入引力势阱的下落气体状态。
AI.result: 研究结果表明，两种情况下不稳定性判据都是经典金斯判据，不受外部引力场影响。流体静力平衡时线性局部扰动总是引力稳定的，而下落气体在满足金斯判据时可发生引力不稳定，即使存在非引力力（如风力）。
AI.conclusion: 金斯判据在调节落入星系引力势阱的气体流或壳层中团块和星团形成方面具有重要作用，同样适用于较小尺度上分子云坍缩过程中的气体碎裂。

title: The Secret Lives of Open Clusters: a Multiwavelength Examination of Three Open Clusters
summary: Star clusters are well known for their dynamical interactions, an outcome of their high stellar densities; in this paper we use multiwavelength observations to search for the unique outcomes of these interactions in three nearby Galactic open clusters: IC 2602 (30 Myr), NGC 2632 (750 Myr) and M67 (4 Gyr). We compared X-ray observations from all-sky surveys like eROSITA, plus archival observations from Chandra X-ray Observatory, survey radio observations from ASKAP's Evolutionary Map of the Universe survey plus archival VLA observations, in conjunction with new cluster catalogs with Gaia. From X-ray, we found 77 X-ray sources likely associated with IC 2602, 31 X-ray sources in NGC 2632, and 31 near M67's central regions. We were further able to classify these X-ray sources based on their optical variability and any radio emission. Three IC 2602 X-ray sources had radio counterparts, which are likely all chromospherically active binary stars. We also identified luminous radio and X-ray variability from a spectroscopic triple system in M67, WOCS 3012/S1077, which is either consistent with a quiescent black hole binary, or due to an active binary stellar system. A recent population study of optical variables by Anderson & Hunt 2025 shows that the population of optical variables in open clusters clearly changes over cluster age; this pilot study gives evidence that the X-ray population also changes with time, and demonstrates the need for a broader multiwavelength study of Galactic open clusters.

AI.tldr: 利用多波段观测研究三个不同年龄银河系疏散星团（IC 2602、NGC 2632、M67）中动力学相互作用产生的独特天体，发现X射线源数量随星团年龄变化，并识别出可能的黑洞双星或活跃双星系统。
AI.motivation: 疏散星团因高恒星密度而产生丰富的动力学相互作用，本研究旨在通过多波段观测寻找这些相互作用在三个不同年龄星团中产生的独特天体现象，探索星团演化过程中X射线和射电源群体的变化规律。
AI.method: 使用多波段观测数据：包括eROSITA全天巡天和钱德拉X射线天文台的X射线数据，ASKAP演化宇宙图巡天和VLA档案的射电数据，结合盖亚卫星的新星团星表。对IC 2602（3000万年）、NGC 2632（7.5亿年）和M67（40亿年）三个不同年龄星团进行综合分析，通过光学变异性特征和射电发射对X射线源进行分类。
AI.result: 在IC 2602中发现77个可能相关的X射线源，NGC 2632中31个，M67中心区域31个。IC 2602中3个X射线源有射电对应体，均为色球活跃双星。在M67中发现光谱三重系统WOCS 3012/S1077具有明亮的射电和X射线变异性，可能对应宁静黑洞双星或活跃双星系统。研究表明X射线源群体随星团年龄变化。
AI.conclusion: 这项试点研究表明疏散星团中的X射线源群体随时间演化而变化，与光学变星群体的年龄依赖性相似。研究结果强调了需要对银河系疏散星团进行更广泛的多波段研究，以深入理解星团动力学相互作用和演化过程。

title: MUSEQuBES: Investigating the Physical and Chemical Properties of Circumgalactic Gas Around Ly$α$ Emitters at $z \approx 3.3$
comment: 18 pages (7 in Appendix), 15 figures (6 in Appendix); Submitted to MNRAS
summary: We present a detailed study of the physical properties of absorbers associated with $z\approx3.3$ \lya\ emitters (LAEs) from the MUSEQuBES survey. Using \HI\ and ionic column densities derived from Voigt profile fitting, we determine the density and metallicity of 75 absorbers associated with 59 LAEs through a custom-built Bayesian framework. The overall sample shows a median density $\log\,(n_{\rm H}/{\rm cm^{-3}})=-2.7\pm0.7$ and metallicity \met$=-1.6^{+1.2}_{-0.9}$ with $\approx15\%$ ($\approx 40\%$ including upper limits) of systems showing metallicities consistent with the IGM at these redshifts (\met$\lesssim -2.8$). Intriguingly, absorbers with $\log\, N(\rm HI)/{\rm cm^{-2}} \gtrsim 16.5$, corresponding to an overdensity of $\sim 100$ at $z=3$, exhibit a bimodal metallicity distribution with peaks at \met$=-3.8\pm 0.2$ and $-1.8\pm 0.6$. The latter are observed at large impact parameters ($\gtrsim150$~pkpc) and often exhibit low-ionization species (e.g., \SiII, \AlII). We interpret the former as pristine inflowing gas from the cosmic web, while the latter likely traces metal-enriched CGM associated with outflows from faint galaxies not detected in Ly$α$ emission. We find no significant correlations between absorber metallicity or density and host galaxy properties, including redshift, impact parameter, SFR, Ly$α$ luminosity, or environment. Absorbers separated by $\lesssim500$~\kms\ show $\sim$1~dex metallicity and $\sim$0.5~dex density variations, indicating physical and chemical inhomogeneity of the medium around these LAEs.

AI.tldr: 该研究分析了z≈3.3的莱曼α发射体（LAEs）相关吸收体的物理性质，发现高柱密度吸收体存在双峰金属丰度分布，分别对应原始流入气体和金属富集的外流气体，且吸收体性质与宿主星系特性无显著相关性。
AI.motivation: 研究高红移莱曼α发射体周围吸收气体的物理和化学性质，了解星系际介质（IGM）和星系晕（CGM）的金属富集过程，以及星系形成演化中的气体流入和流出机制。
AI.method: 使用MUSEQuBES巡天数据，通过Voigt剖面拟合获得中性氢和离子柱密度，采用自定义贝叶斯框架分析75个与59个LAEs相关的吸收体，确定其密度和金属丰度。
AI.result: 整体样本中位数密度log(n_H/cm^-3)=-2.7±0.7，金属丰度[M/H]=-1.6^{+1.2}_{-0.9}；约15%（包括上限约40%）系统金属丰度与IGM一致。高柱密度吸收体（log N(HI)≳16.5）呈现双峰金属丰度分布：峰值在[M/H]=-3.8±0.2（原始流入气体）和-1.8±0.6（金属富集外流气体）。吸收体金属丰度和密度与宿主星系特性无显著相关性，但速度间隔≲500 km/s的吸收体显示约1 dex金属丰度和0.5 dex密度变化。
AI.conclusion: 高红移LAEs周围介质存在显著的物理和化学不均匀性，高柱密度吸收体的双峰金属丰度分布揭示了原始宇宙网气体流入和金属富集星系晕外流两种不同起源的气体成分，为理解早期星系形成中的气体循环提供了重要线索。

title: A survey of molecular clouds in the Galactic center's outflow
comment: 16 pages, 8 figures, accepted for publication in A&A
summary: The nucleus of the Milky Way is known to drive a large-scale, multiphase galactic outflow, with gas phases ranging from the hot highly-ionized to the cold molecular component. In this work, we present the first systematic search for molecules in the Milky Way wind. We use the Atacama Pathfinder EXperiment (APEX) to observe the 12CO(2-1) emission line in 19 fields centered on previously known high-velocity atomic hydrogen (HI) clouds associated with the outflow. Over 200 CO clumps are detected within 16 different HI clouds. These clumps have typical radii of 1 - 3 parsec, high velocity dispersions of 1 - 6 km/s and molecular gas masses ranging from a few to several hundred solar masses. Molecular clumps in the wind sit on the low-mass end of the mass - size relation of regular molecular clouds, but are far displaced from the mass (or size) - linewidth relation, being generally more turbulent and showing high internal pressures. Nearly 90% of the clumps are gravitationally unbound with virial parameters >> 10 - 100, indicating that these structures are either being disrupted or they must be confined by external pressure from the surrounding hot medium. While the observed properties of CO clumps do not seem to evolve clearly with latitude, we find that molecular gas is not detected in any of the 6 HI clouds with projected distances over 1 kpc from the Galactic Center, suggesting the existence of a maximum timescale of ~ 3 Myr for the dissociation of molecular gas within the wind. Overall, current observations in the Galactic center support a scenario in which a hot wind entrains cold gas clouds from the disk, driving their progressive transformation from molecular to atomic and ultimately ionized gas through stripping, turbulence, and dissociation.

AI.tldr: 首次系统性地在银河系风中发现分子气体，通过APEX望远镜观测到200多个CO团块，这些团块具有高速度弥散、低质量和引力束缚状态，揭示了银河系风如何将冷气体从分子态逐步转化为原子态和电离态的过程。
AI.motivation: 银河系中心驱动着大规模多相星系风，但之前对银河系风中分子气体的系统性研究仍然缺乏。本研究旨在填补这一空白，探索银河系风中分子气体的存在、性质和演化。
AI.method: 使用阿塔卡马探路者实验（APEX）望远镜观测12CO(2-1)发射线，在19个以已知高速原子氢云为中心的区域进行观测，这些氢云与银河系风相关。
AI.result: 在16个不同的HI云中检测到200多个CO团块，这些团块具有典型半径1-3秒差距、高速度弥散1-6 km/s、分子气体质量从几到几百太阳质量。90%的团块引力束缚状态差（维里参数>>10-100），在距离银心1 kpc以上的HI云中未检测到分子气体。
AI.conclusion: 银河系中心观测支持一个场景：热风从星系盘捕获冷气体云，通过剥离、湍流和解离过程，驱动这些气体从分子态逐步转化为原子态和最终的电离态，分子气体在风中的存在时间上限约为300万年。

title: First direct electron temperature measurement in [O II] zone in I Zw 18
comment: 4 pages, 4 figures, 1 appendix. Accepted for publication in A&A Letters
summary: We present new precise measurements of electron temperatures and oxygen abundances in the southeast knot of I Zw 18, one of the most metal-poor blue compact dwarf galaxies known, using spectroscopic data from the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument Data Release 1 (DESI DR1). For the first time in I Zw 18, we directly measure electron temperature in the low-ionization zone using the rarely detected [O II] $λ\lambda7320,7330$ doublet. We also detect the auroral lines [O III] $\lambda4363$ and [S III] $\lambda6312$, associated with high and intermediate ionization zones, respectively. We derive $T_{\mathrm{e}}([\mathrm{O}\,\mathrm{III}])=21\,200\pm860\ \mathrm{K}$, $T_{\mathrm{e}}([\mathrm{O}\,\mathrm{II}])=16\,170\pm950\ \mathrm{K}$, and $T_{\mathrm{e}}([\mathrm{S}\,\mathrm{III}])=17\,290\pm1750\ \mathrm{K}$, highlighting a significant temperature difference between ionization zones. Using these direct temperature measurements, we determine a total oxygen abundance of $12+\log(\mathrm{O}/\mathrm{H})=7.066\pm0.046$, $\log(\mathrm{N}/\mathrm{O})=-1.509\pm0.097$, and $\log(\mathrm{S}/\mathrm{O})=-1.558\pm0.041$. Our results extend the calibration of $t_2$--$t_3$ relations to the highest temperatures, providing important anchor points for the temperature structure of extremely metal-poor H II regions, including high-redshift galaxies where direct temperature measurements are especially challenging.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用DESI DR1光谱数据，首次在极贫金属矮星系I Zw 18中直接测量了低电离区的电子温度，并获得了高、中电离区的温度数据，揭示了不同电离区间的显著温度差异，为极高温度下的温度关系校准提供了重要参考。
AI.motivation: 研究极贫金属蓝致密矮星系I Zw 18的物理性质，特别是其不同电离区的电子温度结构和元素丰度，这对于理解早期宇宙星系的化学演化具有重要意义。由于直接测量极贫金属区域的电子温度在技术上具有挑战性，特别是在高红移星系中，因此需要建立可靠的温度校准关系。
AI.method: 使用暗能量光谱仪数据发布1（DESI DR1）的光谱数据，首次在I Zw 18中直接检测了低电离区的[O II] λλ7320,7330双线，同时检测了高电离区的[O III] λ4363和中电离区的[S III] λ6312等极光线。基于这些直接温度测量，计算了电子温度和元素丰度。
AI.result: 测量得到：高电离区Te([O III])=21,200±860 K，低电离区Te([O II])=16,170±950 K，中电离区Te([S III])=17,290±1750 K，显示出电离区间的显著温度差异。总氧丰度为12+log(O/H)=7.066±0.046，氮氧比log(N/O)=-1.509±0.097，硫氧比log(S/O)=-1.558±0.041。
AI.conclusion: 该研究扩展了t2-t3温度关系校准到最高温度范围，为极贫金属H II区域（包括高红移星系）的温度结构提供了重要的锚定点，这些直接温度测量对于理解早期宇宙星系的化学演化具有重要价值。

title: Sahyadri: A simulation suite for the cosmology dependence of the Cosmic Web
comment: 29 pages, 17 figures, prepared for submission to JCAP, comments welcome
summary: We present Sahyadri, a suite of cosmological $N$-body simulations designed to enable precision studies of the low-redshift Universe with next-generation spectroscopic surveys. Sahyadri includes systematic variations of six cosmological parameters around Planck 2018 constraints, with seed-matched initial conditions enabling cosmological parameter derivatives. Each simulation evolves $2048^3$ particles in a periodic box of side length $200$ $h^{-1}$ Mpc, yielding a particle mass of $m_{\rm{p}} = 8.1 \times 10^{7}\,h^{-1}\,M_{\odot}$ in the fiducial Planck 2018 cosmology. This resolution enables robust identification of dark matter halos down to $M_{\rm min} = 3.2 \times 10^{9}$ $h^{-1}$ $M_\odot$, which represents a factor of $\sim$25 improvement over the AbacusSummit suite, and is over two orders of magnitude better than the Quijote and Aemulus suites. We estimate that approximately 40% of DESI BGS galaxies at redshift $z < 0.15$ - roughly 1.6 million objects - reside in halos accessible to Sahyadri but beyond the reach of existing parameter-varying simulation suites. We demonstrate Sahyadri's capabilities through measurements of the matter power spectrum, halo mass function and power spectrum, and beyond 2-point statistics such as the Voronoi volume function and $k^{\rm th}$ nearest neighbour statistics, showing excellent agreement with theoretical predictions and significant sensitivity to $Ω_{\rm m}$ variations. We implement a custom compression scheme reducing storage requirements by a factor of $\sim$3 while maintaining sub-percent clustering accuracy. Key data products will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: Sahyadri是一套宇宙学N体模拟套件，专为下一代光谱巡天的低红移宇宙精密研究设计，具有高分辨率和系统性的宇宙学参数变化。
AI.motivation: 为下一代光谱巡天（如DESI）提供高精度的低红移宇宙模拟工具，现有模拟套件（如AbacusSummit、Quijote、Aemulus）在分辨率和暗晕探测能力上不足，无法满足DESI BGS星系的研究需求。
AI.method: 开发Sahyadri模拟套件，包含围绕Planck 2018约束的六个宇宙学参数系统变化，使用种子匹配的初始条件以计算宇宙学参数导数。每个模拟在200 h^{-1} Mpc的周期盒中演化2048^3个粒子，粒子质量为8.1×10^7 h^{-1} M⊙，能够可靠识别低至3.2×10^9 h^{-1} M⊙的暗晕。
AI.result: Sahyadri的分辨率比AbacusSummit提高约25倍，比Quijote和Aemulus提高两个数量级以上。估计约40%的DESI BGS星系（约160万个）位于Sahyadri可探测但现有模拟套件无法探测的暗晕中。模拟结果与理论预测高度一致，对Ω_m变化表现出显著敏感性，并实现了存储需求减少约3倍的自定义压缩方案。
AI.conclusion: Sahyadri模拟套件为下一代光谱巡天提供了前所未有的低红移宇宙模拟能力，其高分辨率能够探测到现有模拟无法覆盖的大量星系，关键数据产品将公开可用，将推动宇宙学参数约束和星系形成研究。

title: Intermediate-mass black hole incubators. Gas accretion onto stellar black hole clusters in galactic central molecular zones
comment: To be published in Astronomy & Astrophysics; 6 pages, 2 figures
summary: The stellar dynamical evolution of massive star clusters formed during starburst periods leads to the segregation of $\gtrsim10^4 M_\odot$ stellar-mass black hole sub-clusters in their centres. In gas-rich environments, such as galactic central molecular zones, these black hole clusters are likely to accrete large amounts of the gas from their surroundings, which in turn affects their internal dynamics. In this Letter we estimated the corresponding accretion rate onto the black hole cluster and its radiative feedback. We assessed whether such an accretion flow can lead to the collapse of the black hole cluster into an intermediate-mass black hole. The estimates were obtained analytically, considering the astrophysical conditions and star formation history reported for the central molecular zone of our Galaxy. We find that a stellar black hole cluster with mass $\gtrsim10^4 M_\odot$ located in the twisted ring of molecular clouds with radius $\approx100$ pc that is observed in the central molecular zone of our Galaxy can accrete about the same mass in gas on a timescale of a few million years. We suggest that this is sufficient for its subsequent collapse into an intermediate-mass black hole. Based on an estimate of the dynamical friction inspiral time, we further argue that the locations of the intermediate-mass black hole candidates recently observed in the central molecular zone are compatible with their formation therein during the last starburst period reported to have occurred $\approx1$ Gyr ago.

AI.tldr: 研究探讨了在银河系中心分子区，大质量星团演化形成的黑洞星团如何通过吸积周围气体，最终坍缩形成中等质量黑洞的过程。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是理解在气体丰富的星系中心区域，恒星黑洞星团如何通过吸积周围气体影响其内部动力学，并可能最终坍缩形成中等质量黑洞的物理过程。
AI.method: 采用解析分析方法，基于银河系中心分子区的天体物理条件和恒星形成历史，估算黑洞星团的吸积率、辐射反馈以及动力学摩擦内旋时间。
AI.result: 研究发现，位于银河系中心分子区半径约100pc扭曲分子云环中的质量≥10^4 M⊙的黑洞星团，可以在几百万年内吸积与其自身质量相当的气体，这足以使其后续坍缩形成中等质量黑洞。
AI.conclusion: 银河系中心分子区最近观测到的中等质量黑洞候选体的位置，与它们在约10亿年前最后一次星暴期间在该区域形成的可能性是兼容的，黑洞星团通过吸积气体最终坍缩形成中等质量黑洞是可行的演化路径。

title: Local Group analogues in a cosmological context -- I. Relating velocity structure to the cosmic web
comment: 17 pages, 13 + 2 figures, 1 table, comments are welcome!
summary: Our Local Group, dominated in mass by the Milky Way (MW) and M31, provides a unique laboratory for testing $Λ$CDM cosmology on small scales owing to its proximity. However, its connection to the surrounding large-scale environment, which is essential for interpreting its properties, is inadequately understood. In this work, we explore the connection between Local Group analogues (LGAs) and their surrounding large-scale environments using the ABACUSSUMMIT simulation suite, highlighting the key role of the coupling energy of the MW-M31 orbit, $E_{\rm coupling}$. We find that LGAs with high $E_{\rm coupling}$ preferentially reside in denser regions, whereas those with low $E_{\rm coupling}$ tend to occupy low-density environments. Furthermore, LGAs with low $E_{\rm coupling}$ exhibit strong alignment with cosmic filaments, manifested as a pronounced polar anisotropy in the distribution of tracer haloes. By contrast, LGAs with high $E_{\rm coupling}$ show a weaker polar anisotropy but an enhanced azimuthal anisotropy, with large-scale tracer haloes preferentially lying in the plane spanned by the halo pair and the orbital spin vector. Within this framework, our Local Group is characterised by typical $E_{\rm coupling}$ residing in a relatively under-dense environment, yet it remains consistent with the 95\% range of analogue systems identified in the simulation.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用ABACUSSUMMIT模拟探索本星系群类似系统与周围大尺度环境的关系，发现耦合能量E_coupling是关键参数：高耦合能量的系统倾向于位于高密度区域，而低耦合能量的系统则位于低密度环境且与宇宙纤维结构对齐。
AI.motivation: 本星系群（银河系和M31主导）是测试ΛCDM宇宙学在小尺度上的重要实验室，但其与周围大尺度环境的关系尚未充分理解，这对解释其性质至关重要。
AI.method: 使用ABACUSSUMMIT模拟套件研究本星系群类似系统，重点关注银河系-M31轨道耦合能量E_coupling的作用，分析系统在不同耦合能量下与周围大尺度环境的关系。
AI.result: 高E_coupling的系统倾向于位于高密度区域，低E_coupling的系统则位于低密度环境且与宇宙纤维结构强烈对齐，表现为示踪晕分布的明显极向各向异性。高E_coupling系统显示出较弱的极向各向异性但增强的方位各向异性，大尺度示踪晕优先位于晕对和轨道自旋向量所张的平面内。
AI.conclusion: 我们的本星系群具有典型的E_coupling值，位于相对低密度的环境中，但仍与模拟中识别的类似系统的95%范围一致，这为理解本星系群在宇宙环境中的位置提供了新视角。

title: Baryon Acoustic Oscillations from the C IV Forest with DESI DR2
summary: We present a measurement of Baryon Acoustic Oscillations (BAO) in the cross-correlation of triply ionized carbon C IV absorption with the positions of quasars (QSO) and Emission Line Galaxies (ELG). We use quasars and ELGs from the second data release (DR2) of the Dark Energy Spectroscopic Instrument (DESI) survey. Our data sample consists of 2.5 million quasars, 3.1 million ELGs, and the C IV absorption is measured along the line of sight of 1.5 million high redshift quasars with $z > 1.3$. We measure the isotropic BAO signal at 4.2$σ$ for the CIV$\times$QSO cross-correlation. This translates into a 3.0% precision measurement of the ratio of the isotropic distance scale, $D_{\rm V}$, and the sound horizon at the drag epoch, $r_{\rm d}$, with $D_{\rm V}/r_{\rm d}(z_{\rm eff} = 1.92) = 30.3 \pm 0.9$. We make the first detection of the BAO feature in the CIV$\times$ELG cross-correlation at a significance of 2.5$σ$ and find $D_{\rm V}/r_{\rm d}(z_{\rm eff} = 1.47) = 24.6 \pm 1.0$.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过DESI巡天的第二期数据，测量了三重电离碳C IV吸收与类星体及发射线星系位置的交叉相关中的重子声学振荡信号，首次在CIV×ELG交叉相关中探测到BAO特征。
AI.motivation: 利用重子声学振荡（BAO）作为宇宙学标准尺来约束宇宙学参数，特别是通过C IV吸收与不同天体（类星体和发射线星系）的交叉相关来扩展BAO测量的红移范围和提高精度。
AI.method: 使用DESI巡天DR2数据，包括250万类星体、310万发射线星系，以及150万高红移（z>1.3）类星体视线方向的C IV吸收测量，分析CIV×QSO和CIV×ELG的交叉相关函数中的BAO信号。
AI.result: 在CIV×QSO交叉相关中以4.2σ显著性检测到各向同性BAO信号，得到D_V/r_d(z_eff=1.92)=30.3±0.9（3.0%精度）；首次在CIV×ELG交叉相关中以2.5σ显著性检测到BAO特征，得到D_V/r_d(z_eff=1.47)=24.6±1.0。
AI.conclusion: 该研究成功利用C IV吸收与不同天体的交叉相关测量了BAO信号，扩展了BAO测量的红移范围，为宇宙学参数约束提供了新的高红移数据点，特别是首次在CIV×ELG交叉相关中探测到BAO特征。
